Package tools.PathplannerFlip.AutonFlip

Class PathplannerAutonFlip

java.lang.Object
tools.ToolClasses.VarArgumentedTool<String>
tools.PathplannerFlip.AutonFlip.PathplannerAutonFlip
public class PathplannerAutonFlip extends VarArgumentedTool<String>

Pathplanner Auton Flipper

Flips autons of your choice across the y coordinate axis

This class extends VarArgumentedTool and takes in a list of auton names as arguments. It reads each .auto file, flips the paths used in the auton, and saves a new .auto file with " Flipped" appended to the original name.
